name: smart_buses_monorepo
description: Monorepo: Frontend + ms-security y futuros microservicios

scripts.dev: concurrently --names "FRONTEND,SECURITY,NOTIFICATION,LOGIC" --prefix-colors "cyan,green,blue,magenta" "npm run dev --prefix buses_frontend" "npm run dev:security" "npm run dev:notification" "npm run dev:logic"
scripts.setup:notification: cd ms-notification && python -m venv venv && .\venv\Scripts\pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix buses_frontend && npm install --prefix ms-logic
